source_ranges.label: Chef intro at workbench
source_ranges.reason: Frank Proto (Chef Instructor, ICE) introduces himself; clean establishing wide shot

source_ranges.label: Butter the hot pan
source_ranges.reason: Top-down pan close-up: butter placed in hot pan and melted

source_ranges.label: Ladle in the batter
source_ranges.reason: Chef pours pre-mixed batter from bowl/ladle into pan

source_ranges.label: Cook until golden
source_ranges.reason: Pancake cooks, bubbles form on surface, hand visible adjusting

source_ranges.label: Plate and serve
source_ranges.reason: Cooked golden pancake transferred from pan to plate

crop_decisions.reason: Center crop of 1280x720 -> 9:16; chef is centered in this wide shot
Right-shifted crop (offset 600) because the pan and plate in the top-down shots sit right-of-center; keeps pan, pancake, hands, and plated result inside the vertical frame

audio_adjustments.reason: Normalize loudness for social-media playback, prevent clipping (TP -1.5 dBTP)

checks_performed: sampled output frames at t=3, 22, 50 to verify captions and visible pan/chef/plate
librosa loudness check (max abs, RMS, silent fraction)
verified expert-only source range (excluded 0-165s novice montage and 264+ banter/end-card)
